vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on group File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/group, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/group

triage_decision.reason: This finding involves correcting file permissions on /etc/group, a standard system file. The remediation is a simple chmod command that does not affect authentication, networking, or filesystems. It follows standard STIG hardening patterns and is unlikely to cause system breakage or lockout.
